title: horkelia clevelandii
intro: Horkelia clevelandii, also known as Cleveland's horkelia, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. Horkelia clevelandii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its potential medicinal and health benefits.
